notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz plunked
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Horwitz hit by pitch. Tyler Callihan scores. Jake Mangum to 3rd. Jared Triolo to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Stowers plunked
notableEvents.detail: Marlins challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Kyle Stowers hit by pitch. Xavier Edwards to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Esteury Ruiz pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Esteury Ruiz singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jake Mangum.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Pirates challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Esteury Ruiz steals (12) 2nd base.
